summary: Frontend testing completed for TeacherHubPro homepage v4 update. All features tested successfully: American/European classroom images, Platform Integrations section with 6 cards and 3 NEW badges, full translations for all 7 languages (EN, ES, FR, PT, DE, IT, ZH), feature sections with images, login functionality, and mobile responsiveness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro homepage v4 update tested successfully. All multi-language features working for 7 languages, Platform Integrations section with 6 cards and 3 NEW badges, American/European classroom images, and mobile responsiveness verified.
